title: Pilosocereus luetzelburgii
taxonomy: Pilosocereus luetzelburgii is classified as a species of cactus in the family Cactaceae. It is a member of the genus Pilosocereus, which is a group of columnar cacti that are native to southern Africa. The classification of Pilosocereus luetzelburgii is as follows: kingdom: Plantae, phylum: Magnoliophyta, class: Magnoliopsida, order: Caryophyllales, family: Cactaceae, genus: Pilosocereus, species: P. luetzelburgii. The genus Pilosocereus is further divided into several species, with Pilosocereus luetzelburgii being one of them. This classification helps to identify and distinguish Pilosocereus luetzelburgii from other species of cacti.
